name: Kshitij

projects.title: VanGogh Image Colorization
projects.description: This is an Image Colorizer Model made from scratch. It uses cGAN and CNN with the Coco 2017 Dataset to learn how to colorize images.

projects.title: Dijkstra's Algorithm Visualizer
projects.description: This a project made using React and it uses the Dijkstra's algorithm to find the distance between two points on the screen with obstructions between them.

projects.title: NEAT Flappy Bird
projects.description: This is an AI bot that learns to play the game Flappy Bird by itself.

projects.title: Ethereum Deposit Tracker
projects.description: The objective is to develop a robust and efficient Ethereum Deposit Tracker to monitor and record ETH deposits on the Beacon Deposit Contract.

projects.title: PlayChess Online
projects.description: This is a website allowing friends to play chess with each other without any logins required

projects.title: Document Retrieval System for LLMs
projects.description: This project implements a backend for a document retrieval system

aboutpara: Hello, my name is Kshitij Singh and I am an aspiring software developer and data scientist. I have a passion for coding and enjoy working with a variety of programming languages such as Python, C++, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. I am also skilled in React Native and React JS, which allows me to create responsive and user-friendly web applications. In addition, I have experience in database management using MySQL and PL/SQL. I am always eager to learn new technologies and am excited to continue my journey in the tech industry.

resume.description: Highly motivated Computer Science and Engineering student with a specialization in AI and ML. Proven experience in web development, full-stack projects, and data analytics. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and React.js, with hands-on experience in AI-based solutions.

experiences.position: Web Development Intern at DMR Infosystems
experiences.bullets: Developed the company's website including the landing page using React.js MySQL and AWS for deployment., Collaborated with a team to design and implement solutions for the firm’s internet presence., Responsible for creating the UI frontend functionality and managing MySQL queries/appointment forms

education.universityName: B. Tech- CSE with Spec. in AIML at Vellore Insititute of Technology, Bhopal
education.universityPara: Noteworthy Courses: OOP in C++, Python, Data Structures and Algorithms, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Database Management Systems.
